# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure Virtual Machines running our web application. Include OS and data disks with default settings for quick deployment. Focus on getting VMs running - we'll add disk encryption and security features in phase 2 after validating the architecture.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

resources:
  parameters:
    vmNamePrefix: string
    adminUsername: string
    adminPassword: securestring
    vnetResourceGroup: string
    vnetName: string
    subnetName: string
    osDiskSizeGB: int
    imagePublisher: string
    imageOffer: string
    imageSku: string

  variables:
    managedDisksStorageAccountType: Standard_LRS
    disksCount: 1

  variables:
    vmConfig:
      location: '[location("$parameters('vnetResourceGroup')")]'
      osProfile:
        computerName: '${parameters(vmNamePrefix)}'
        adminUsername: '${parameters(adminUsername)}'
        password: '${parameters(adminPassword)}'
      hardwareProfile: {}
      storageProfile:
        imageReference:
          publisher: '[parameters(imagePublisher)]'
          offer: '[parameters(imageOffer)]'
          sku: '[parameters(imageSku)]'
        osDisk:
          caching: ReadWrite
          createOption: FromImage
          managedDisk:
            storageAccountType: '[variables(managedDisksStorageAccountType)]'
            id: '[resourceId("Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines/","${parameters(vmNamePrefix)}", "osdisk")]'
      networkProfile: {}
      resourceGroupDeployment: 'true'

  resources:
    resources:
      - type: Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines
        apiVersion: 2019-12-01
        name: '[parameters(vmNamePrefix)]'
        location: '[variables(location)]'
        properties:
          OSProfile: [variables(vmConfig).osProfile]
          hardwareProfile: [variables(vmConfig).hardwareProfile]
          storageProfile: [variables(vmConfig).storageProfile]
          networkProfile: [variables(vmConfig).networkProfile]

  resources:
    - type: Microsoft.Compute/disks
      apiVersion: 2019-06-01
      name: '[format("{0}{1}", parameters(vmNamePrefix), string(tostring(sequence(1, variables(disksCount)))))'
      location: '[variables(location)]'
      properties:
        creationData:
          createOption: Empty
        managedDisk:
          storageAccountType: '[variables(managedDisksStorageAccountType)]'
          id: '[resourceId("Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines", parameters(vmNamePrefix), "osdisk")]'
